items.title: Supreme Court won’t hear AI-generated art copyright case

items.title: New Lenovo Legion Go gaming handheld concept has a foldable display, check out the new trailer
items.summary:
Lenovo is known for showcasing bold concepts at MWC each year, and this time it’s turning heads with a foldable gaming handheld. It’s one of the first truly compelling use cases we’re seeing for the foldable tech beyond smartphones. Called the Legion Go Fold, this concept device features a display that folds in half to offer a compact 7.7-inch screen that sits between two controller halves when closed, and it expands into a larger 11.6-inch display when unfolded. You can use it in both vertical and horizontal orientations, which makes it a versatile unit. It’s easily one of the most exciting devices to come out of MWC this year, and you can learn more about it in detail below.

items.title: Skip the Apple tax and score this LG UltraFine 4K monitor for your M4 Mac Mini while it’s down to $250 (All-time low)
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops LG’s UltraFine 32-inch 4K UHD monitor down to $249.99 shipped. Regularly priced around $350, this value-packed display is now seeing a solid $100 discount, making it one of the more affordable 32-inch 4K options out there. While we’ve seen the 27-inch UltraFine dip to the $250 range before, this is the first time this relatively newer 32-inch model has dropped this low. Today’s offer – also matched directly at LG – comes in $30 below its previous all-time low to mark a new best price. This is a pretty good option to consider if you’re in the market for a capable display for your Mac setup without splurging on Apple’s premium options, and you can learn more about it below.

more…
